settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, security and bank accounts.

users.title: User management
users.intro: Manage who is allowed to access your account.

bank.title: Bank accounts
bank.intro: These are the accounts you can withdraw your funds to.

security.title: Security
security.twoFADesc: Protect your account with an additional verification code.
security.closeDesc: Your Quercus account will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible.

statements.title: Statements
statements.subtitle: View and download your monthly account statements.
statements.emptyHint: Statements will be generated automatically at the end of each month.

products.title: Our products
products.subtitle: Select a product to start placing your liquidity.
products.liquidity: T+0 liquidity for orders placed before 12:25 CET. Yields shown are indicative and net of management fees.

advised.title: Advised Portfolio
advised.desc: Bespoke wealth allocation built with your dedicated advisor — combining Smart Cash, Cash & Carry, bonds, equities and alternative solutions.

modal.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect Quercus to your accounting, banking and payment tools.
integrations.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
integrations.footer: Real OAuth connections to each service will be enabled progressively. For priority deployment, contact your account manager.

advisor.title: My advisor
advisor.lockedSubtitle: A service reserved for clients investing €3M or more.
advisor.lockedHero: A dedicated advisor, just for you.
advisor.lockedDesc: From <0>€3M invested</0>, a Wealth Manager supports you personally: bespoke allocation, tax optimization and priority follow-up by phone, email or appointment.

perks.title: Bespoke allocation
perks.desc: A strategy designed for your overall wealth situation.

perks.title: Priority follow-up
perks.desc: Guaranteed reply within 24 business hours from your dedicated Wealth Manager.

perks.title: Directly reachable
perks.desc: Phone, email, in-person or video meeting.

advisor.subtitle: Your dedicated Wealth Manager, reachable by message, email or phone.
advisor.credentials: CIF ORIAS no. 24004789 · Wealth Advisor — AMF
advisor.availability: Available Monday to Friday, 9am–7pm. Reply guaranteed within 24 business hours.

deposit.title: Deposit funds
deposit.subtitleProduct: Choose a product and an account
deposit.warning: Only make transfers from a bank account in your own name. The amount you transfer determines your subscription.

waiting.title: We are awaiting your transfer
waiting.desc: Your funds will usually appear within 24 business hours. You will be notified by email upon receipt.

proof.title: Subscription pledge
proof.desc: Generates a PDF to give to your bank to justify the transfer.
